programs.title: Come Dine With Me
programs.desc: It's the fourth night of the competition in Cardiff and the turn of IT consultant and part time party boy Rave-id to welcome his guests with a fully vegan dining experience.

programs.title: Come Dine With Me
programs.desc: It's the final night in Cardiff and the turn of wise-cracking back cracker Pete to impress his guests with a traditional menu including some locally sourced ingredients.

programs.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programs.desc: Adam and his guests, chef Kay-Lete Tan and writer Benjamin Law work wonders with sweet citrus.

programs.title: The Cook And The Chef
programs.desc: Simon and Maggie look at the value of growing your own food in the backyard and getting to know your local producers. Maggie creates a cake using her home-grown pumpkin and Simon coddles locally caught salmon.

programs.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programs.sub_title: Fishing The Adriatic With Uncle Emilio
programs.desc: Lidia fell in love with the sea growing up near the Adriatic's beautiful rocky beaches. Fishing trips with Uncle Emilio were always a lot of hard work, but definitely worth the delicious reward.

programs.title: Tastes And Traditions
programs.desc: In this episode of Tastes and Traditions, we dive into comforting, hearty dishes rooted in home cooking and Ukrainian culinary heritage.
